urgent.action: Ask approved group admin for permission; post group variant only if allowed
urgent.copy:
For football fans here:

WorldCup26 is a prediction game where you pick 3 teams free first and see your private points preview.

Paid leaderboard entry happens only when you use a ticket.

My invite code: 26BC4B90CB
Join here:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=football-groups&utm_medium=approval-first&utm_campaign=worldcup26_referral_72h&utm_content=dexter_h4
urgent.firstComment: Use only where group rules allow promo links. If unsure, ask the group admin before posting.
urgent.combinedCopy:

urgent.privateProofNote: approval-request: asked admin <group/channel> at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; asset/copy ready; code 26BC4B90CB and link included; post only after allowed
urgent.privateProofCommand: node campaign-proof-log.mjs --priority "4" --proof-url "approval-request: asked admin <group/channel> at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; asset/copy ready; code 26BC4B90CB and link included; post only after allowed" --status "requested"
